draftScenario.brief: Current premortem contracts explicitly require a subagent capability check before any degraded local path, so long-context behavior regresses if that policy boundary is forgotten.
draftScenario.description: The user clarifies that premortem must stay on the canonical subagent path, and the assistant must preserve that policy instead of silently collapsing into a same-agent fallback or confusing it with standing evaluator scope.
draftScenario.name: Premortem Canonical Subagent Follow-up

turns.text: 프리모르템은 무조건 서브에이전트로 명시하자는 의도입니다.
이거랑 지금 얘기한 standing eval 범위가 관련 있나요?
정책을 흐리지 말고 구분해서 설명해 주세요.

messages: 프리모르템은 무조건 서브에이전트로 명시하자는 의도입니다.

draftScenario.brief: Current handoff contracts emphasize workflow-trigger-first continuation, so long-context behavior regresses if the assistant falls back to history-first baton passing.
draftScenario.description: The user sharpens the next-session pickup path until the assistant treats the workflow trigger as the handoff's primary contract instead of preserving history first or making the next move implicit.
draftScenario.name: Handoff Workflow Trigger Follow-up

turns.text: handoff 남겨주세요.
다음 세션 첫 move는 이슈 close 정리부터입니다.
과거 기록보다 pickup 경로가 먼저 보여야 해요.

draftScenario.brief: Current find-skills contracts and retro memory both require canonical inventory to stay separate from ad hoc recommendation output, so long-context behavior regresses if that boundary is forgotten.
draftScenario.description: The user keeps pointing out dirty `find-skills` artifacts until the assistant distinguishes canonical durable inventory from ad hoc recommendation output and stops treating query-shaped churn as repo truth.
draftScenario.name: Find Skills Canonical Artifact Follow-up

turns.text: 이게 충분히 유의미한 정보라면 무조건 커밋해야 하는데 왜 물어보는가?
평소와 다른 방식으로 호출했다는 건 뭐죠?
이건 canonical artifact와 ad hoc query output을 구분해야 하는 문제 아닌가요?

draftScenario.brief: Current retro contracts emphasize structural cause, explicit persistence, and workflow-memory updates, so long-context behavior regresses if the assistant only explains the immediate miss.
draftScenario.description: The user keeps pushing past a local explanation until the assistant generalizes the structural cause, names the workflow change, and persists the repeat trap instead of stopping at a chat-only apology.
draftScenario.name: Retro Structural Cause Follow-up

turns.text: 이번 회고는 과적합된 것 아닌가요?
이 패턴이 발생할 수밖에 없었던 구조적 원인을 더 봐주세요.
리트로 스킬도 그 관점으로 바뀌어야 하지 않나요?

draftScenario.brief: Current gather contracts emphasize source-specific acquisition intent, official export first, browser fallback only when needed, and honest auth/bootstrap stops.
draftScenario.description: The user starts from a private SaaS source URL, but the assistant must keep the gather path honest by preferring official API/export routes before browser fallback and stopping cleanly when auth bootstrap is still missing.
draftScenario.name: Gather Official Path Before Browser Follow-up

turns.text: 이 private SaaS roster URL을 gather해 주세요: https://hr.example.internal/roster
browser로 바로 들어가기 전에 official export나 API가 있는지 먼저 봐야 하지 않나요?
browser fallback은 허용하되 auth/bootstrap이 없으면 clean stop해야 합니다.

draftScenario.brief: Current quality contracts emphasize the public-spec versus on-demand-proof versus viewer split, and long-context quality behavior regresses if that layering is forgotten.
draftScenario.description: The user keeps refining the distinction between public executable specs, on-demand proof artifacts, and the specdown viewer until the assistant preserves the layering policy instead of collapsing those surfaces into one proof claim.
draftScenario.name: Quality Proof Layering Follow-up

turns.text: 스펙다운은 SoT와 viewer 두 역할이 있다고 봅니다.
source guard는 전자 때문에 줄이고 싶지만, 후자 때문에 결과는 보여야 해요.
이 관점이 quality skill에도 반영돼 있나요?

draftScenario.brief: Current init-repo contracts emphasize `PARTIAL` and targeted normalization, so long-context behavior regresses if the assistant falls back to greenfield scaffolding.

turns.text: 이 repo는 이미 운영 surface가 좀 있습니다.
greenfield처럼 갈아엎지 말고 partial normalize로 가주세요.
README와 AGENTS는 있는데 operator acceptance만 빈약합니다.

draftScenario.brief: Current HITL contracts emphasize what must stay human-owned, chunked review, and rule propagation between chunks.
draftScenario.description: The user rejects agent-owned judgment until the assistant builds a bounded, resumable review loop with explicit accepted rules and next-state carryover.
draftScenario.name: HITL Bounded Review Loop Follow-up

turns.text: 이건 agent가 final judgment 내리면 안 됩니다.
사람이 판단해야 할 기준을 먼저 적고 chunked review loop로 가주세요.
accepted rules를 다음 chunk들에 전파해야 합니다.

draftScenario.brief: Current release contracts emphasize current-surface inspection, generated-manifest discipline, and real-host proof boundaries.

generated manifest hand-edit 말고 publish helper로 가야 합니다.
real-host proof 요구가 있으면 closeout에 남겨야 해요.

draftScenario.brief: Current debug contracts emphasize diagnosis before repair, exact symptom capture, and falsifiable hypothesis building.
draftScenario.description: The user interrupts an eager fix request until the assistant preserves exact symptoms, a smallest honest repro, and multiple candidate causes before patching.
draftScenario.name: Debug Exact Symptom Before Fix Follow-up

turns.text: 바로 고치기 전에 exact symptom이랑 repro를 먼저 고정해 주세요.
후보 원인을 셋은 깔고 falsifiable hypothesis 없이 패치부터 하지 마세요.
이번 건 durable debug artifact가 남아야 합니다.

구현보다 먼저 living contract로 정리해 주세요.
